original_file: Clinical Practice Guideline Exercise and Lifestyle in Chronic Kidney Disease.md
title: Exercise and Lifestyle in Chronic Kidney Disease
summary: This document provides comprehensive guidelines for exercise and lifestyle management in individuals with chronic kidney disease (CKD), including those on haemodialysis and after transplantation. It emphasizes the benefits of physical activity for improving health outcomes and quality of life, offering specific recommendations tailored to different CKD stages and treatment modalities. The guidelines also cover crucial aspects like weight management and other lifestyle factors.
